policies.details: No refunds after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within 7 days can be submitted to support@autostream.io.
24/7 support is available only on the Pro plan. Basic plan users have access to email support during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM EST, Mon-Fri).

company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream helps content creators automate their video editing workflow with AI-powered tools, saving hours of manual editing time.
